有机会真想去问问他们啊～

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>あの<Ruby={2:4}そら>空に<Ruby={2:2}う>浮かんでる<Ruby={2:4}しま>島は <Ruby={2:4}なん>何なんでしょうね～

<unk[3:0:263]><Color=red>ゾナウ<Ruby={6:12}ちょうさたい>調査隊<Color=white>に<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}そら>空の<Ruby={2:4}しま>島の<Ruby={6:10}せんもんか>専門家<Color=white>がいるらしいんで

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>I'm fascinated by those islands floating in
the sky. What are they...<unk[5:0]>really?

<unk[3:0:263]>The <Color=red>Zonai Survey Team<Color=white> has an <Color=red>expert on
sky islands<Color=white> somewhere in the kingdom.
Maybe that person could tell me.
Hm?

rows.TWzh: 嗯？有東西在動嗎？
rows.JPja: ん？ <Ruby={2:4}なに>何か<Ruby={2:4}うご>動いたか？
rows.USen: Did...I see something?

rows.TWzh: 這是怎麼回事？
rows.JPja: どうなってんだ？
rows.USen: What's going on?

rows.TWzh: 為什麼會浮起來呢？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}なん>何で<Ruby={2:2}う>浮いてんだ？
rows.USen: Why is it floating?

rows.TWzh: 希望雨能快點停……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}はや>早く<Ruby={2:2}や>止まないかな…
rows.USen: No sign of letting up.

rows.TWzh: 那身姿真是充滿了衝勁……
rows.JPja: その<Ruby={2:6}すがた>姿… <Ruby={6:10}きあいはい>気合入ってますね
rows.USen: Pulling that off takes guts.

rows.TWzh: 體……體格真好……
rows.JPja: す… <Ruby={4:4}すば>素晴らしいお<Ruby={2:6}からだ>体で…
rows.USen: What a free spirit!

rows.TWzh: 穿這樣不冷嗎？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}さむ>寒くありません？
rows.USen: Aren't you cold?

rows.TWzh: 請不要這樣！
rows.JPja: おやめください！
rows.USen: Please, stop!

rows.TWzh: 什、什麼！？
rows.JPja: な… <Ruby={2:4}なに>何を！？
rows.USen: What is happening?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:266]>格鲁德族的贵客难得来一趟，
我要正经一点才对……<unk[5:2]>不好意思……
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>说起来，我没想到居然能
从格鲁德族人的口中听到林克阁下的名字。
能和格鲁德族的族长大人结盟……<unk[5:0]>这种事……

虽然和我没关系，
但好像自己也跟着沾光了呢！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:266]>難得有格魯德族的人來這裡，
我得振作點才行……<unk[5:2]>讓您見笑了……
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>但是真沒想到能從格魯德族口中
聽到林克閣下的威名。
像是和格魯德族的族長大人締結盟約<unk[5:0]>之類的……

雖然這跟我沒關係，
不過我也感到與有榮焉呢！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:266]>せっかくゲルド<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族の<Ruby={2:4}かた>方が <Ruby={2:2}き>来てくださったのに
ちゃんとしないとダメですよね… <unk[5:2]>すみません…
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>でも ゲルド<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族の<Ruby={2:4}かた>方から リンク<Ruby={2:4}どの>殿のお<Ruby={4:6}なまえ>名前を
<Ruby={2:2}き>聞くとは<Ruby={2:4}おも>思いませんでしたよ
ゲルド<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族の<Ruby={6:14}ぞくちょうさま>族長様と<Ruby={4:8}めいやく>盟約を<Ruby={2:4}むす>結ばれた <unk[5:0]>とか… 

<Ruby={4:8}かんけい>関係ないけど
なんだか<Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分まで<Ruby={2:4}はな>鼻が<Ruby={2:4}たか>高いですよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:266]>With the Gerudo here, I should really
focus on what's in front of me... <unk[5:1]>Sorry.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>I have to say, they seem to be big fans
of yours.<PageBreak>I'm still in awe that you made a vow with
their chief.<PageBreak>Is it weird to say I'm proud of you?

of those sky islands, I've thought about
practically nothing else.
<unk[3:0:266]>Gah! The Gerudo came all this way to

distracted. <unk[5:1]>Sorry. I'll shut up about it...

Survey Team<Color=white>?
If I ever leave my post here, I think I'm
going to ask that person all about it.

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>I'm fascinated by that island floating in
the sky. What's it made of? How did it
get there?
<unk[3:0:263]>Come to think of it, there's a <Color=red>sky island
expert <Color=white>on the <Color=red>Zonai Survey Team<Color=white>. I bet
they'd have some answers for me.
<Color=grey><unk[3:0:268]><Size=80>With Jirba and the other Gerudo here, I could

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>那座浮空的岛屿到底是什么呢～

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>I'm so curious about that island floating
in the sky. What's it made of? How did it
get there?
<unk[3:0:263]>Maybe I should talk to that <Color=red>sky island
expert <Color=white>on the <Color=red>Zonai Survey Team<Color=white>. I bet
they'd have some answers for me.
<Color=grey><unk[3:0:268]><Size=80>Jirba's out on a monster-control crew mission, but I
can probably sneak off to Kakariko Village for a bit...<Size=100><Color=white>

rows.TWzh: 看不到耶……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}み>見えないな…
rows.USen: I can't see her.

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>No matter how hard you squint, she's not
visible from here.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>有传闻说看见公主殿下在海拉鲁城堡里，
我想万一是真的，便自己也一直在搜寻……
<unk[3:0:266]>无奈这里距离太远……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>傳聞指出有人在海拉魯城堡<Color=red>看見公主殿下<Color=white>，
而我也一直都在找他……
<unk[3:0:266]>只可惜那個地方距離這裡太遠了……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>ハイラル<Ruby={2:6}じょう>城で<Ruby={4:8}ひめさま>姫様を<Ruby={2:2}み>見たとの<Ruby={2:6}うわさ>噂があり
もしやと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思い <Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分も<Ruby={2:4}さが>捜していたんですが…
<unk[3:0:266]>いかんせん ここからは<Ruby={2:4}とお>遠すぎて…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>We got word that the princess was
spotted<Color=red> <Color=white>at Hyrule Castle. I was hoping
I'd catch sight of her.
<unk[3:0:266]>But the castle's so far—I can't see much
of anything.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>虽然我自认为视力不错，
但不用<Color=red>望远镜<Color=white>实在是看不清啊……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>儘管我對自己的視力很有自信，
但終究還是得靠<Color=red>望遠鏡<Color=white>才行啊……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]><Ruby={4:8}しりょく>視力には<Ruby={4:6}じしん>自信がある<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方だけど
やっぱり<Color=red> <Ruby={6:14}ぼうえんきょう>望遠鏡<Color=white>でも<Ruby={2:4}つか>使わないと<Ruby={4:4}むり>無理だよなぁ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>Usually I don't have a problem spotting
stuff. I think it's just not possible without
a <Color=red>telescope<Color=white>.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>天上居然会掉下来这种东西……
幸好没人受伤。
不过这样一来，也需要对上空加以警戒了。<unk[5:0]>
我们一定要保护好监视堡垒。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>真沒想到這種東西會從天空掉下來……
幸好沒有人因此受傷，
但也因此得對上空多加警戒，
<unk[5:0]>得由我們守護好監視堡壘的安全才行。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>こんなものが <Ruby={2:4}そら>空から<Ruby={2:2}お>落ちてくるなんて…
<Ruby={2:6}さいわ>幸い<Ruby={6:8}けがにん>怪我人は<Ruby={2:2}で>出なかったようですが
<Ruby={4:10}じょうくう>上空にも<Ruby={4:8}けいかい>警戒が<Ruby={4:8}ひつよう>必要ですね<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={6:12}かんしとりで>監視砦の<Ruby={4:8}あんぜん>安全は <Ruby={4:8}われわれ>我々が<Ruby={2:4}まも>守っていかないと
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>For a thing that big and heavy to come
crashing down on us...<unk[5:0]> It's kind of a
miracle no one got hurt.
I'll look out for more falling debris.<unk[5:0]> Gotta
keep Lookout Landing safe!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>看来上空也同样需要警戒。<unk[5:0]>
我们一定要保护好监视堡垒。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>但也因此得對上空多加警戒，

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>I'll keep an eye out for more falling debris.<unk[5:0]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>您见过那座坠落的石碑了吗？

那里已经交给
调查员和松达建筑店的人负责了……
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>以前我也看见过有东西
从那座巨大无比的空岛上掉下来，
所以除了监视堡垒本身，
上空的警戒也不能疏忽。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>你已經見過墜落的石碑了嗎？

那裡已經交給調查員
和松達建築店的成員們了……
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>以前也好像有什麼東西
從那座格外巨大的空島上掉了下來。
我們不僅會戒備監視堡壘，
也會留意上空加強警戒。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:6}らっか>落下してきた<Ruby={4:6}せきひ>石碑を<Ruby={2:2}み>見ましたか？

あちらは <Ruby={6:12}ちょうさいん>調査員の<Ruby={2:4}かた>方とエノキダ<Ruby={6:10}こうむてん>工務店の<Ruby={2:4}かた>方に
<Ruby={2:4}まか>任せることになりましたが…
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:6}いぜん>以前あの ひときわでっかい<Ruby={2:4}そら>空に<Ruby={2:2}う>浮かぶ<Ruby={2:4}しま>島からも
<Ruby={2:4}なに>何かが<Ruby={2:2}お>落ちてくるのを <Ruby={2:2}み>見たことあるので
<Ruby={6:12}かんしとりで>監視砦の<Ruby={4:6}けいび>警備は<Ruby={4:8}もちろん>勿論ですが <Ruby={4:10}じょうくう>上空にも<Ruby={2:2}き>気を<Ruby={2:4}くば>配って
<Ruby={4:8}けいかい>警戒を <Ruby={2:6}おこた>怠らないようにするつもりです
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Didja see the stone tablet that fell?


It was left up to the researchers and the
folks from Hudson Construction to deal
with it.
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>But that's not the first thing that's fallen
on us. I saw something else come down
from that huge sky island once.
If I'm gonna keep Lookout Landing safe,
clearly I need to keep an eye on the skies!

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Didja see the stone tablet that fell?


It was left up to the researchers and the
folks from Hudson Construction to deal
with it.
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>But it's not the first thing that's fallen
around here. I saw something else come
down from that huge sky island once.
If I'm gonna keep Lookout Landing safe,
I need to look out for falling debris! I'll tell
the Gerudo to watch the skies too.

was left up to the researchers and the
folks from Hudson Construction.

around here. I saw something else come
down from that huge sky island once.
If I'm gonna keep Lookout Landing safe,
clearly I need to keep an eye on the skies!

<Ruby={4:10}じょうくう>上空への<Ruby={4:8}けいかい>警戒も <Ruby={2:6}おこた>怠らないつもりです
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Hey, stranger! Didja see the stone tablet
that fell?

<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>Oh!<unk[5:0]> Pardon me, Link... <unk[5:1]> It took me a
moment to recognize you. I'm so glad
to see that you're safe.
<unk[3:0:256]>What was I saying? The stone tablet—it
was left up to the researchers and the
folks from Hudson Construction.
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>But it's not the first thing that's fallen
around here. I saw something else come
down from that huge sky island once.
If I'm gonna keep Lookout Landing safe,
I need to look out for falling debris! I'll tell
the Gerudo to watch the skies too.
